closure_note: All original residuals R5–R20 implemented and verified. QC tri-review produced 4 Critical + 3 Warning (all fixed in follow-up commits) + 17 Suggestions (tracked as post-QC tech debt in status.json residual_findings['v1.30-post-qc-tech-debt']).

findings.title: body.md written before SQL INSERT — orphaned files on DB failure
findings.closure_note: Write order reversed: SQL INSERT first, body.md second (commit 50e9a4d).

findings.title: list_references returns all rows unbounded — no pagination
findings.closure_note: LIMIT/OFFSET pagination added with DEFAULT_PAGE_LIMIT (commit 50e9a4d). Clamping added in QC fix (commit 056a41e).

findings.title: content_hash always NULL — integrity field unused
db_err maps all sqlx::Error to ValidationError — no Storage variant
KbQuery fetches all blocks into memory then filters — no DB-level pagination
SessionCapture created at agent-stop time produces near-zero session metrics
findings.closure_note: SessionCapture created at session start with session_captures map in MultiplexedWorkerState (commit f7fca31).

findings.title: KB extract job claim is not atomic across next_queued + mark_running
findings.closure_note: Atomic claim_job with SELECT+UPDATE in single transaction (commit 87371c2). rows_affected check added in QC fix (commit e468c07).

findings.title: kb.extract_work placeholder — no full extraction lifecycle
findings.closure_note: Full e2e lifecycle: claim → extract → parse → KeyBlock insert → mark_done (commit 87371c2). Reordered mark_done before KeyBlock in QC fix (commit ca3ec44).

findings.title: Persistent child Drop cleanup is best-effort and Unix-only
findings.closure_note: SIGTERM→wait→SIGKILL Drop hardening (commit f7fca31). PID existence check added in QC fix (commit 3d7e90c).

findings.title: KB extract job IDs use custom timestamp-derived generation
findings.closure_note: UUIDv4 xj_ prefix IDs with insert_with_retry (commit 87371c2).

findings.title: creator command module approaching maintainability threshold
findings.closure_note: KB handlers extracted to creator/kb.rs, mod.rs reduced ~30% (commit c262d4c).

findings.title: KB extract status list is unbounded
